title: The Provident Funds Act, 1925
full_text: The Provident Funds Act, 1925 भविष्‍य निधि अधिनियम,1925 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 192519 Act Number: 19 Enactment Date: 1925-08-27 Act Year: 1925 Short Title: The Provident Funds Act, 1925 Hindi Title: भविष्‍य निधि अधिनियम,1925 Long Title: An Act to amend and consolidate the law relating to Government and other Provident Funds. Ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment Enforcement Date: 01-04-1926 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Provident Funds Act, 1925 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Protection of compulsory deposits. Section 4. Provisions regarding re-payments. Section 5. Rights of nominees. Section 6. Power to make deductions. Section 6A. Withholding or recovery of Government contributions in case of Central Government officers taking up, without prior permission, commercial employment within two years of their retirement. Section 7. Protection for acts done in good faith. Section 8. Power to apply the Act to other Provident Funds. Section 9. Savings as to estates of soldiers. Section 10. Repealed.. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
